flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Denver rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.8k → $61.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Denver rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($54.8k → $61.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Denver fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).
